Source URL: https://www.sba.gov/local-assistance

# SCORE Companion Route from SBDC Context

## Reusable BOSS response pattern
When the user also needs operator mentoring, accountability, or industry judgment, route to SCORE as a companion to SBDC. Explain that SBDC is stronger for local technical/planning support while SCORE is stronger for mentor relationships.

## Handoff fields to capture
- Stage
- Business idea/current business
- Location ZIP/county
- Primary decision
- What has been done
- Revenue/customer evidence
- Documents available
- Special eligibility or language preference
- Recommended resource and why
